Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $38,634,938Details
International Box Office $98,387,307
Worldwide Box Office $137,022,245
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $26,186,193
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $216,629
Total $26,402,822
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,169,779 (23.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.21 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:28.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,540 opening theaters/2,565 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $63,511,791

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 10th, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
Video Release: December 18th, 2007 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some fantasy violence and risque humor
Running Time: 128 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Pirates, Royalty, Witches
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Matthew Vaughn, Lorenzo di Bonaventura
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English
